title: Simon Eskildsen on scaling Shopify, building turbopuffer, and the future of databases
summary: Simon Eskildsen, CEO of turbopuffer, discusses scaling challenges at Shopify, the cyclical emergence of new database companies every 15 years, limitations of AI coding agents, and the qualities of elite engineers. Topics include infrastructure evolution, database design philosophy, and hiring in the AI era.
